noun.name: Starscream
noun.summary:
红蜘蛛是奸诈的霸天虎空中指挥官，也是追踪者中最致命的。他自称是塞伯坦战争学院的骄傲，不仅以其令人难以置信的技能而闻名，还以其无限（且麻烦）的野心而闻名。红蜘蛛认为他比霸天虎领袖威震天更适合指挥，从简单地希望这个头衔来打击他的自尊心到真正关心威震天的运作方式。
值得庆幸的是，红蜘蛛叛变、夺权阴谋几乎总是透明的，他永远无法鼓起足够的耐心来完成一场宏大的权力游戏。即使在他几次指挥霸天虎的时候，他也很快就失去了对局势的控制，他太傲慢了，从不从错误中吸取教训，但话又说回来，威震天也没有，因为他从未将红蜘蛛变成渣滓。尽管他不断失败，但红蜘蛛相信他获胜只是时间问题——他的命运是不可避免的。
红蜘蛛原本是塞伯坦星球的一名研究地质专业的科学家，枯燥的研究生活使他加入了霸天虎。尽管已作为威震天的副官位极人臣，但巨大的野心使他不安于现状，一心想着有一天取代威震天成为霸天虎的首领，然而屡次发动叛乱都因实力不足和无人响应而失败。

noun.name: Ironhide(G1)
noun.summary:
Ironhide is an Autobot and later Maximal from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Ironhide is one of the oldest and toughest Autobots, and has been on Optimus Prime's team for a long time. "They don't make them like they used to" is an apt description of Ironhide—he's yesterday's model, but he's built to last.

Gruff and ornery, he prefers actions to words, and dislikes talk for talk's sake. (He wouldn't enjoy being paired up with Bluestreak.) But though he may be rough around the edges, he's still optimistic and upbeat. The upside to being through more than your share of trouble means trouble ain't so big a scare anymore.

Ironhide's most distinctive ability is the water gun, a weapon which can generate and shoot a liquid of virtually any type. Liquid nitrogen is historically a favorite, but there have been acids, mortar, and more.

His vehicle mode sometimes splits into his robot and a separate component. In some universes, he can combine with his fellow Autobots to form Optimus Maximus. In other timelines, he will survive the Great War, joining forces with other Autobot veterans to form Magnaboss.

actors.name: 伊丸岡篤
actors.short_summary: 日本の男性声優。マウスプロモーション所属。群馬県伊勢崎市出身。

noun.name: Ratchet(G1)
noun.summary:
Ratchet is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Ratchet is the Autobots' Chief Medical Officer. If something's broke, he can fix it. Ratchet is known for his irreverent bedside manner; he loves having a good time, and his party-loving nature has given him a dry wit. He is not a particularly mighty warrior, which sometimes leads him to believe that he is expendable. Optimus Prime has trouble convincing Ratchet that this is far from the truth.

Although he's a healer, Ratchet often finds himself on the front lines of combat and, on occasion, the last hope the Autobots have. These pressures are sometimes too much for him to handle, but Ratchet ultimately never gives up.

actors.name: Corey Burton
actors.short_summary: 美国配音演员。

noun.name: Sentinel Prime
noun.summary:
御天敌是一位很威武的人物，凌驾于大多数汽车人之上。包裹全身的重武器以及适用于汽车人军队的装甲使得御天敌充满了对自己作为一名领袖和战士的能力的自信。不幸的是这样的骄傲通常会使人堕落，而总会有个人 会证明这一点，或是某个仅仅把御天敌看做是实现大业道路上的绊脚石。

御天敌是和擎天柱最近的汽车人前任领袖。（他不是领袖的时候除外）

actors.name: 諏訪部順一
actors.short_summary: 日本の男性声優、ナレーター、歌手。東京俳優生活協同組合所属。

noun.name: Brawn(G1)
noun.summary:
Brawn is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Brawn, the Autobots' demolitions expert, is amazingly strong for his size. Due to his small stature, he often attempts to overcompensate by playing up his macho personality. He loves a challenge, be it rugged off-roading or charging headlong at foes several times his size. He has a lot of chutzpah, and a somewhat sarcastic sense of humor ever at the ready. Due to his machisimo, he sometimes looks down on noncombatant Autobots.

In addition to his great strength, Brawn is also so tough as to be almost indestructible. Almost.

Sometimes he is an ancient Titan Master, and sometimes he is partnered with the Nebulon Muscles as a Headmaster.

actors.name: 長嶝高士
actors.short_summary:
日本の男性声優。和歌山県出身。アーツビジョン所属。

以前经历剧团青年座研究所、本田工作室、剧团莎士比亚剧场，现所属ARTSVISION（经由日本播音演技研究所进入）。
从1990年代初期投入动画、游戏配音以来，长嶝经常帮主角或同一部作品里的许多配角进行配音，其中又以参加任天堂和卡普空制作的电玩作品较多。因此为人熟知的游戏配音作品有《大金刚》系列的主角大金刚、《萨尔达传说》系列的加农德洛夫、《火焰之纹章 晓之女神》的旁白、《街头霸王EX》系列的达朗·米斯特、《正义学园》系列的柏曼·迪尔卡多与石动岩及同公司的其它游戏系列的配角。动画方面，有《鬼灯的冷彻》的阎魔大王、《ONE PIECE》的钻石裘斯、《火影忍者》系列的宇智波八代、《龙珠改》的多多利亚及《日常》的富冈老师等多位中年男子。
除了活跃动画与游戏的配音之外，他还有参加特摄影集“超级战队系列”系列的配音。从《激走战队车连者》开始，经常在作品里面饰演反派，在《爆龙战队暴连者》中曾经饰声演主角群的伙伴。
兴趣和特长有登山、踩高跷、卡拉OK。

noun.name: Huffer(G1)
noun.summary:
Huffer is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

To say that Huffer is cranky is an understatement. Huffer's the poster boy for whiny pessimism. He complains and grumbles his way through every day, especially since he's been shipwrecked on Earth. If he thought his existence was unbearable before, it's intolerable now, and he'll certainly let you know. There is no light in his dark hours... which is all the time.

Despite what a joy he is to be around, he's very effective at his job. A construction engineer, he can whip up anything of any complexity. Unfortunately, he'll be kicking and screaming the whole way.

noun.name: Cliffjumper(G1)
noun.summary:
Cliffjumper is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Nobody hates Decepticons more than Cliffjumper. He's always ready to charge into battle, a gung-ho little hero who'll take on any threat with a cry of "Lemme at 'em!" He's daring, dedicated, and determined, and takes the business of fighting evil seriously, but he's not a patient 'bot; he'll often act without thinking, shooting first and asking questions later, or picking fights that he really can't hope to win. He's even been known to blow out his own tires by speeding into action too quickly!

Cliffjumper doesn't dislike Earth, but any concern he has for it comes in a distant second to taking down a 'Con, and that means he'll often cause damage to the surrounding area in battle without really thinking about it, which in turn leads to lectures from Optimus Prime. But that's far from the worst disagreement he's been known to have with his fellow Autobots: his hatred for the Decepticons is so great that, if he gets the sense one of his team-mates isn't fully committed to the Autobot cause, he'll be quick to point an accusing finger and even cry "traitor!", as Mirage has found out more than once.

Cliffjumper's special weapon is his glass gas, which embrittles metals on contact so that they shatter like glass.

noun.name: Prowl(g1)
noun.summary:
Prowl is an Autobot and later Maximal from the Generation 1 continuity family.
(thumbnail)

Prick.
Prowl is the Autobot military strategist. As such, Autobot Commander Optimus Prime keeps Prowl near at hand for his indispensable expertise. Prowl is quiet, competent, loyal, and possessed of almost endless patience.

Prowl's dedication to logic and reason make him an excellent strategist, but not much of a socialite. He really doesn't tend to get along well with his fellow Autobots, many of whom find his strict adherence to military protocol stifling, and his uptight personality sure doesn't help matters. He does not react well to the unexpected, to the point that it can literally scramble his cerebral circuits. The Dinobot commander Grimlock, who is disorder made manifest, especially honks Prowl off, and Grimlock feels pretty much the same way in return, only with more swear words. He's very fond of his acid pellets, though.

In some universes, his need for control can lead him to combine with the Constructicons to form Devastator, or with other Autobots — including Optimus Prime — into Optimus Maximus. In other timelines, at the twilight of the Great War, he joined forces with fellow veterans Ironhide and Silverbolt to form Magnaboss, instrumental to the final Autobot victory.

actors.name: Jeff Bennett
actors.short_summary: Jeff Bennett was born on October 2, 1962 in Houston, Texas, USA as Jeffrey Glenn Bennett. He is known for his work on Enchanted (2007), Johnny Bravo (1997) and The Penguins of Madagascar (2008).

noun.name: Wheeljack(G1)
noun.summary:
Wheeljack is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Wheeljack is his own worst enemy. Something of a crackpot inventor, a good half of his creations blow up in his face, and that's just if he's lucky. His constant need to invent increasingly complex devices stems from his desire to improve the Autobots' tech, but as a result he's simultaneously one of the Autobots' greatest assets and problems; for every successful gadget he builds, there's one which requires Ratchet or Hoist to put him (and his lab) back together. But once in a while he strikes gold, which has won him respect from even the Decepticons.

He is, however, not a complete nerd. As good as he is in the lab, Wheeljack is just as amazing on the road: there are few stunts he can't pull off, and he loves to show off his driving skills as much as he does his inventions. He is, however, a little less confident when it comes to flying, which he accomplishes using solid-fuel rocket jets in his forearms.

As an Action Master Wheeljack utilizes another of his inventions, the dual-mode Turbo Racer, to get around quickly. In some universes he can combine with his fellow Autobots to form Sky Reign.

noun.name: Mirage(G1)
noun.summary:
Mirage is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Mirage is what humans call "old money." Before the war, he was a member of affluent Cybertronian society, with his own large estate and high-priced friends. He enjoyed the finer things in life: vintage energon, swank evening events, and turbofox hunts on the grounds. But when the war started, he was forced to choose sides and found himself banded with a group of commoners he didn't really understand. Mirage demands certain high standards from life and has little time for those who can't "rise" to his class.

Some of the other Autobots don't trust Mirage. He feels the war, even after all these millions of years, is beneath him. War is not, after all, how civilized, erudite beings conduct themselves. He often questions the Autobots' violent means, and not-so-secretly hopes they and the Decepticons can get along. Because of this, he has been labelled by a few others as a Decepticon sympathizer. Under Mirage's "holier than thou" attitude pulses the spark of a loyal friend and a consummate field professional... but, most of the time, it's kind of hard to see past his obvious self-involvement. Still, he sided with Optimus Prime for a reason, and he'll be there for the Autobots when they need him.

Mirage has the ability to create illusions which typically either render him invisible or make him appear to be somewhere he isn't. In some universes, he can combine with his fellow Autobots to form Optimus Maximus.

noun.name: Hound(G1)
noun.summary:
Hound is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Hound wishes he were human. The dark, barren metalscapes of Cybertron no longer interest him. Now that Hound has been shipwrecked on Earth, he considers this planet his home. He sees humankind as beautiful and wishes he could interact with their ecosphere the same way they do, to feel what they feel and to see what they see.

He treasures his job as an Autobot scout, making good use of his ability to project holograms for added disguise, and making good use of his skill to track machines and humans alike (like the hound dog of his namesake). He uses this opportunity to explore the breathtaking caverns and mountainous expanses that Earth provides. He's a meek, benevolent soul, even compared to his fellow Autobots. He gets along with the more blood-thirsty of their ranks but not the most blood-thirsty of their ranks.

noun.name: Sideswipe(G1)
noun.summary:
Sideswipe is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Sideswipe is not nearly as much of a sociopath as his brother Sunstreaker, but he is every bit as skillful. He's more into battle for the sport of it. A bit of a jock, Sideswipe most craves a glorious fight to the finish as a test of his mettle.

With a little reckless edge in his tactics, Sideswipe makes rash decisions that may endanger him, all in the name of possible victory. When everything is on the line, nothing is out of the question for Sideswipe, even cheating. Although his reckless attitude has not changed over time, his cause has: once in it solely for the glory, he's now driven by the desire to defend freedom and the innocent

noun.name: Sunstreaker(G1)
noun.summary:
Sunstreaker is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Sunstreaker knows to the core of his spark that he is better than any other Autobot, and he makes sure everyone else knows it, too. His sociopathic tendencies, combined with his incredible vanity and arrogance, usually result in tension between himself and the other Autobots. He is generally unwilling to help those who are having trouble keeping up, and is quite audible when it comes to complaining about the shortcomings of everyone else. The only Autobot he truly gets along with is his twin brother, Sideswipe, and even that can seem strained at times.

The main reason Optimus Prime keeps him around is most likely Sunstreaker's effectiveness on the battlefield. Ruthless and skilled in all forms of combat, there is not much Sunstreaker cannot handle. As a front-line warrior, Sunstreaker is a great asset for the Autobot army. If a rather scary one.

In some universes, he can combine with his fellow Autobots to form Optimus Maximus.

noun.name: Grimlock(g1)
noun.summary:
Me Grimlock am Dinobot from Generation 1 continuity family.

Some Autobots wonder why Grimlock (aka Clobber) is even on their side. His disposition is much more suited to the Decepticons. After all, he values power and strength over wisdom and compassion, and furthermore, he doesn't really get along with most Autobots. When faced with a problem, his usual responses are to slice it with his energo-sword, tear it to pieces with his bare hands, or outright eat it. He is more willing to accept casualties than most of the Autobot leadership, and doesn't seem particularly concerned about the fleshies either. These things, coupled with his dislike of Optimus Prime, have led to a defection or two on Grimlock's part. He'd have no problem offing the Autobot leader if he thought he could get away with it, though.

What the Autobots don't realize is that the only thing he hates more than weakness is those who abuse their strength, meaning when push comes to shove, Grimlock will always fall in on the right side of the fence. And despite their disagreements, Grimlock holds a respect for Prime's strength and leadership. His real feud within the Autobot ranks is with Prowl; Grimlock's chaotic behavior drives Prowl up the wall, and Prowl's uptight personality gives Grimlock much grief.

Grimlock is the leader of the Dinobots, a small but powerful strike squad. Grimlock himself is extremely strong and durable, and is one of the few Transformers who can not only stand toe-to-toe with Optimus Prime and Megatron, but actually give them a run for their money. Despite his strength and prowess, Grimlock continually struggles with his pronouns.

actors.name: 藤原啓治
actors.short_summary:
日本声优，生于东京，1980年代入行。
代表作品有《十二国记》乍骁宗、《钢之炼金术师》马斯·休斯、《交响诗篇》霍兰德、《蜡笔小新》野原广志、《青之驱魔师》藤本狮郎、《银魂》服部全藏、《潮与虎》苍月紫暮、《传颂之物虚伪的假面》哈克、《玉子市场》北白川豆大等。
2016年8月，因为健康状态不良而退出电视动画的录音，所属事务所并没有公布藤原启治的病因。
2017年6月16日，AIR AGENCY事务所宣布藤原启治正式回归。
2020年4月12日，藤原启治因癌症去世，终年55岁。

频繁演出『机兽新世纪 ZOIDS』『钢之炼金术师』『天保异闻 妖奇士』『血战』『机动战士钢弹00』等人气动画
代表作有蜡笔小新(野原广志)、交响诗篇艾蕾卡7(霍兰德)、钢之炼金术师(休斯)、天保异闻 妖奇士(龙导往压)、机兽新世纪(阿帕因)、BLOOD+(内森)、校园迷糊大王(旁白)、KERORO军曹(旁白、波尔森山)等
所属经历为文学座剧团附属演剧研究所→剧团木山事务所→贤事务所。然后在2006年11月创立自己的事务所AIR AGENCY
和同样为声优的子安武人、樱井孝宏、三木真一郎有相当的交情。
跟楢桥美纪和矢岛晶子一起出席猜谜节目时，被说『广志的台词就「我回来了」这句话是最多的』。
由于野原广志给人的印象太强烈、在2ちゃんねる和したらば掲示板等论坛中、藤原所演出的角色大多被叫「广志」。
在『蜡笔小新』的动画系列中，电视上许多政治家或明星有不伦恋或出柜等新闻都使用藤原的名字（有台词的场合也是他配音的）。
小时候的家教相当严格，大部分的时间没办法看动画，所以只能看『3时のあなた』英语教学节目。

经常配大叔角色。
除了大叔类型的角色外，因为其低沉性感的声系，偶尔也会帮美型男类型的角色配音，包括有钢铁神兵(龙)、棋灵王(绪方精次)、十二国记(骁宗)、圣魔之血(伊萨克‧费南度‧冯‧坎柏菲)、奇迹列车(车掌)和妖怪少爷(奴良鲤伴)等。
藤原启治生前也是美国影星小罗伯特·唐尼的专用日语吹替。

noun.name: Snarl
noun.summary: 嚎叫通常是在沉默之中度过郁闷的时光。这个不合群的家伙喜欢让别人去处理战略方面的事，自己只要听从钢锁派遣直接去打仗就好了。这让他成为机器恐龙指挥官在战场上最得力的战士。嚎叫远离了他的故乡——那片令他钟爱的金属平原，新的变形形态又让他觉得极其恶心，支持他活下去的唯一乐趣只剩下和狂派死磕到底。在他心中，世上比自己的变形形态更为不爽的就只有那些狂派的家伙了。

actors.name: 長嶝高士
actors.short_summary:
日本の男性声優。和歌山県出身。アーツビジョン所属。

以前经历剧团青年座研究所、本田工作室、剧团莎士比亚剧场，现所属ARTSVISION（经由日本播音演技研究所进入）。
从1990年代初期投入动画、游戏配音以来，长嶝经常帮主角或同一部作品里的许多配角进行配音，其中又以参加任天堂和卡普空制作的电玩作品较多。因此为人熟知的游戏配音作品有《大金刚》系列的主角大金刚、《萨尔达传说》系列的加农德洛夫、《火焰之纹章 晓之女神》的旁白、《街头霸王EX》系列的达朗·米斯特、《正义学园》系列的柏曼·迪尔卡多与石动岩及同公司的其它游戏系列的配角。动画方面，有《鬼灯的冷彻》的阎魔大王、《ONE PIECE》的钻石裘斯、《火影忍者》系列的宇智波八代、《龙珠改》的多多利亚及《日常》的富冈老师等多位中年男子。
除了活跃动画与游戏的配音之外，他还有参加特摄影集“超级战队系列”系列的配音。从《激走战队车连者》开始，经常在作品里面饰演反派，在《爆龙战队暴连者》中曾经饰声演主角群的伙伴。
兴趣和特长有登山、踩高跷、卡拉OK。

noun.name: Swoop
noun.summary: 博派恐龙派忠诚勇士，以翼龙形态融合凶猛与飞行之利，虽常因单纯莽撞引人诟病，实则心地善良，善作沟通桥梁。尽管外表骇人，其友善脾性常为误解所掩，但他坚守忠诚，以独特优势震撼战场，让狂派闻风丧胆。

actors.name: 飛田展男
actors.short_summary:
飛田 展男（とびた のぶお、1959年11月6日 - ）は、日本の声優、ナレーターであり、舞台俳優。アーツビジョン所属。
茨城県水戸市出身。水戸市立三の丸小学校、茨城中学校・高等学校卒業。駒澤大学文学部歴史学科中退。体重55kg。血液型はAB型。愛称は「飛ちゃん」。

飞田展男，可以说是日本男声优中的“变色龙”。他的角色反差极大，最为夸张的对比就是《安琪莉可》中的水之守护圣卢米埃和《烈火之炎》中的土门，一个美一个丑，一个柔弱一个健壮，一个温柔一个暴躁，一个优雅一个粗鲁，简直就是两个极端，令人怎么也无法相信这是同一位声优的演绎，但事实就是如此。飞田展男利用发音位置的变化控制声音效果，再辅以气声和力度，塑造出截然相反类型的人物。从控制发音变化的技巧来说，飞田展男是独一无二的。

noun.name: Jetfire
noun.summary:
变形金刚中相当活跃的角色之一。通常是汽车人(Autobot)成员、有时是从霸天虎(Decepticon)转投汽车人，部分作品中有科学家的身份，通常体型比一般的变形金刚来的大，身体以白色为主，背后有红色的枪炮构造、变形成类似飞船或是航天飞机的载具。

在G1动画中，天火是一位善良的老练科学家，身材高大、力量强大，但并不擅长战斗，只喜欢科学实验。在大战前和红蜘蛛(Starscream)是同僚和好朋友，变形成一艘太空船。

在一次探勘任务中，天火意外坠落到地球上，经过多年之后被来到地球的霸天虎给救起，之后不认同霸天虎的理念因而加汽车人。最后为了帮助汽车人，被埋在冰层下，在变形金刚动画第10集后重新被汽车人救起。之后的主要戏份通常是担任汽车人的太空载具。



玩具与版权争议
天火最早的玩具是孩之宝(Hasbro)向万代购买版权的VF-1S的重涂版玩具，来自动画《太空堡垒》系列的原版——1982年的动画《超时空要塞》的VF-1S可变型战斗机。但是因为并没有动画形象使用版权，因此在动画版中的天火形象和玩具经过大幅修改、相差甚异。

于是，在美国的孩之宝卖的天火玩具是属于孩之宝的，但孩之宝的日本合作伙伴特佳丽(Takara)在日本却不能卖、因为同款玩具在日本的贩售权被万代所持有，而为了避免帮敌对公司的玩具打广告，天火在动画中的形象经过重新设计、完全抹除玩具的特征、甚至改名叫作“Skyfire”。其玩具的原始外观之后在部分作品─主要是漫画─中被视为他的“盔甲”，他可以穿戴上以增加火力和防护力。

actors.name: 山口勝平
actors.short_summary:
日本の声優、劇団21世紀FOX所属舞台俳優、芸能プロダクション悟空代表。

为人熟悉的代表配音作品有动画《乱马½》主角早乙女乱马〈男生〉、《犬夜叉》主角犬夜叉、《名侦探柯南》工藤新一、《魔术快斗》主角黑羽快斗／怪盗基德、《ONE PIECE》的骗人布、《死亡笔记本》的L、《我们这一家》的藤野等。
兴趣和特长为画插图、弹吉他、杀阵。入读声优学校之前送过报纸。

noun.name: Thundercracker
noun.summary: 惊天雷犹豫彷徨的性格使得他毫无个人目标，加入霸天虎仅仅是因为他鄙视一切不会飞行的东西。威震天的精心宣传及其个人影响力使惊天雷觉得自己的优越感是正确的，而威震天那些关于霸天虎伟业的豪言壮语，也让惊天雷为自己人生找到了方向。

noun.name: Skywarp
noun.summary: 闹翻天是一个鬼祟阴险的霸天虎战士，他的注意力总是在各种残忍的消遣活动间不停跳转，难得集中。可要是你以为他头脑简单，那就大错特错了，闹翻天能够运用自身能力残忍的大搞破坏，而其手法更可谓天赋秉异、创意无限。他会突然从天而降，把汽车人或其他路过的倒霉蛋打个措手不及，他选择最佳进攻时机的能力简直无人可比。

noun.name: Shockwave
noun.summary:
力量强大，令人敬畏的霸天虎战士，也是极少数和威震天单打独斗还能活着回来的家伙之一，威震天亦对他做出极高评价，忠心耿耿的他是个优秀的变形金刚个体。他非常聪明，逻辑方法十分有效。
震荡波的加农炮手臂与背上的核反应堆相连，可以操纵各种形式的放射波，例如电磁波谱、X射线、红外线以及无线电波，也可以发射强大的能量波。

actors.name: 檜山修之
actors.short_summary:
檜山 修之（ひやま のぶゆき、1967年8月25日- ）は、日本の男性声優、ナレーターである。アーツビジョン所属。広島県廿日市市出身。身長166cm、体重74kg。血液型はA型。星座はおとめ座。干支は羊。

仕事をする時に気をつけていることは「その時やってる役にとにかく専念すること」。

デビューして約5年間、バイトをしながら生活していた。その中の一つである警備員のバイトをしていた頃、道路工事の現場がアフレコスタジオの前だった時があり、同僚にばれないように顔を隠していたという。

自分が声を演じた役の中でヒーロー役の集大成は前述の獅子王凱、悪役の集大成は『機動戦士ガンダムSEED』のムルタ・アズラエル。特に凱を含め『ガオガイガー』には思い入れが強く、『スーパーロボット大戦シリーズ』公式サイト内のインタビューにて、「ガオガイガーが入らずに何が入るんだっていう気もあった」と語っている。

森川智之と仲が良く、森川とは前述の『おまえら〜』のイベントのほか、ラジオ番組を何度か共演している。この2人は主に美形キャラを演じる場合が多い。

大の広島東洋カープファンで知られている。

『スーパーロボット大戦Z』では自身が声を演じた参戦作品の主人公すら出ないにもかかわらず、敵一般兵役で声を演じている。寺田貴信プロデューサーによれば、これは本人から希望したという。また自身もハーケン・ブロウニング役で出演している『無限のフロンティアEXCEED』公式サイトで「声優界で緑川光の次にスパロボ作品をやりこんでいる」とコメントしている。

仕事をする傍らで声優の専門学校や養成所などで、自らが講師として後進の育成も手掛けている。

声優グランプリmobileで既婚であることを公表している。

actors.name: Corey Burton
actors.short_summary: 美国配音演员。

noun.name: Soundwave
noun.summary:
霸天虎的情报参谋，侦察专家，掌握组织内所有的情报交流，是威震天不可或缺的副手之一。

声波很少说话，总是在倾听，经常客串各种争吵的调解人。然而他也总是将一些情报私藏在心里，以便有一天有人威胁到他的地位时，可以借此勒索对方。由于他的自私，没人真正喜欢他，但他对此毫不在意。对他而言，信息就是力量。声波总是发出事先录取的声音，个性也完全不明。

noun.name: Laserbeak
noun.summary:
霸天虎战士，声波的磁带部队成员，是个出色的间谍，曾多次进入汽车人的内部获取重要情报。
激光鸟装备有两门精准的激光大炮，具有不俗的作战能力。镭射密探，隶属于声波的磁带军团，是霸天虎重要的侦察兵，多次进入汽车人的内部获得重要的情报。其装备有两门精准的激光大炮，每门炮都可熔化5厘米的钢板。他以狩猎为乐，总是把他的猎物弄得筋疲力尽，然后慢慢加以残杀。其伪装形态为磁带。

noun.name: Viewfinder
noun.summary: 反光镜是照相机三人组的老大，也是三人中最卑鄙的一个。他和他的组员一样喜爱观察人和事物，但他从中挑刺的能力则无人能及，即使是聚光镜也望尘莫及。反光镜先默默等待着同伴、敌人或其他什么人犯错误，然后便不择手段利用这些错误为自己谋利。他最大的爱好便是敲诈那些玩忽职守或犯了错害怕被上司惩罚的狂派同事。当照相机小组被指派去监视塞伯坦所有秘密摄像机和间谍设备时，反光镜简直乐疯了，因为那将给他提供更多的敲诈资本。

noun.name: Spectro
noun.summary: 分光镜是照相机三人组中头脑最简单的一个。从某种意义上讲，他只是一个工具，只有当别人指明他该干什么、如何干时，他才派得上点儿用场。当与其他两兄弟共事时，分光镜总是悠哉悠哉，因为他不用承担责任了。抢功劳时，分光镜总是冲在最前面，速度几乎和他往别人头上推卸责任时一样快。一旦分光镜察觉同伴反光镜和聚光镜有可能把自己卷入麻烦，他会立即与他们划清界限。

noun.name: Spyglass
noun.summary: 无论是执行间谍任务还是监视任务，聚光镜都算得上是个十足的工作狂。他希望能够观察所有人的言行，以便掌握他们的弱点。每当反光镜想出什么计划时，聚光镜总是第一个表示赞成：他从不放过任何能让自己领先于他人的机会。聚光镜总得花不少时间说服多疑的分光镜同意他们的计划。同时，他还必须尽可能的对分光镜隐藏计划细节。因为他明白只要有利可图，分光镜会立刻出卖他们。

noun.name: Mixmaster
noun.summary: 在搅拌机灼热的搅拌滚筒里，没有任何东西是安全的。在制作新原料地时候，他会利用任何必然的原料，无论是无生命的岩石还是有生命的机器人。他经常会将豪华轿车放入搅拌筒里。然后将他们做成钢梁，当他搅拌原材料的时候，与其说他是个挖地虎战士，还不如说他就是一个咯咯怪叫的中世纪老巫婆—制作新的原料的程序就像是一个神秘的仪式。有时候其他霸天虎成员在观看他搅拌原料的时候，很想知道是不是搅拌机的逻辑中心出了什么问题，以至于他的行为这么神秘兮兮的……尽管如此，他们还是对搅拌机的劳动成果没有任何疑问。

actors.name: 中村大樹
actors.short_summary: 日本の声優、俳優。東京都出身。

actors.name: Jeff Bennett
actors.short_summary: Jeff Bennett was born on October 2, 1962 in Houston, Texas, USA as Jeffrey Glenn Bennett. He is known for his work on Enchanted (2007), Johnny Bravo (1997) and The Penguins of Madagascar (2008).

noun.name: Scrapper
noun.summary: 铲土机为霸天虎设计建设的精美完善的都市和发电厂，充分的体现了他在建筑方面的天赋，同他毫不起眼的外形一样，他所设计的建筑完全能很好的隐迹于人为的建筑当中，面对同伴给予的赞许，他很谦虚地说：“是大家赋予我源源不断的灵感。”毕竟他只是在履行自己的职责。但他藏匿于建筑工地中，对他的敌人进行突袭，这和谦虚相对，可是另外一码事儿。采用这种手段，铲土机努力从威震天那里赢取更多的荣耀和赞赏，多少也显露了他的阴损恶毒的个性。正因如此，威震天认为他是挖地虎中最有价值的战士。（IDW漫画中铲土机被当时观天会高层斯派克·维特维奇射杀。）

actors.name: Tom Kenny
actors.short_summary: 美国演员 / 配音 / 编剧。

noun.name: Spike Witwicky
noun.summary: 汽车人最亲密的地球盟友，原职业为石油工人。他不仅在战斗中成长，还在关键时刻助力汽车人对抗霸天虎，最终成家立业，成为星云星上的重要人物。

actors.name: 小西克幸
actors.short_summary: 日本の声優、ナレーター、舞台俳優。和歌山県和歌山市出身。賢プロダクション所属。関智一が座長を務めていることで知られる劇団「ヘロヘロQカムパニー」の副座長も務める。

noun.name: Omega Supreme
noun.summary:
汽车人成员，一名机器人卫兵，总是把责任看得很重。他力量大、火力强劲，防御出色。其死敌是霸天虎的合体金刚“大力神”。

大力金刚是一名机器卫兵，总是把责任看得很重。他力大，火力强劲，防御能力优秀——这些特点都使他成为汽车人同伴所信赖的一名出色战士。大力金刚的说话方式有异于其他汽车人。由于力大无穷，胃口太大成为了他为数不多的弱点之一。他偶尔也会在长途飞行中因能量不足而导致内部损伤，无法继续运作，因而也能间接看出了老一代汽车人在动力装置上的缺陷。

actors.name: 玄田哲章
actors.short_summary:
1948年5月20日に、岡山県で生まれた。中学・高校時代は芝居と縁がなかったが、受験に際して芝居の道に進みたいという気持ちが強くなり、相談した高校の先生の知人である東映映画のプロデュースを行っていた人物からの紹介で東宝芸能アカデミーに入学。卒業後、新劇の道に進もうと文学座と劇団雲のオーディションを受けたが、両方とも落選。悩んでたところに、野沢那智主宰の劇団薔薇座の募集を目にしに1970年に入団した。当初は1年だけのつもりが、17年間在籍した。

1972年24歳の時に野沢から、「そろそろお前もやらないか?」と紹介され声優業を始める。テレビアニメ『科学忍者隊ガッチャマン』のアフレコ現場を見学。同作で多数の端役を担当し、以降、声優として様々な作品をこなすようになった。声優業を始めた当時を「当日に台本を渡され台本の見方も分からないままスタジオに入れられ、喋り出しても画面に合わなくて悔しい思いをした」と振り返っている。

2010年に第4回声優アワード功労賞を受賞した。

actors.name: 高垣彩陽
actors.short_summary:
高垣 彩陽（たかがき あやひ、1985年10月25日 - ）は、日本の声優、歌手、舞台女優。
東京都出身。ミュージックレイン所属。愛称はあやひー、あやひちゃんなど。家族構成では、弟と妹が1人ずついる。
代表作に『戦姫絶唱シンフォギアG』（雪音クリス）、『ガンダム Gのレコンギスタ』（マニィ・アンバサダ）、『ジュエルペット マジカルチェンジ』（ラリマー）などがある。

2019年8月23日、舞台出演時にスタッフだった男性と結婚したことを発表。

actors.name: Tara Strong
actors.short_summary: Tara Lyn Strong is a Canadian–American actress who has done voice work for numerous animations and video games and performed in various live-action productions. Many of her major voice roles include animated series such as Rugrats, The Powerpuff Girls, The Fairly OddParents, Drawn Together, Ben 10, Chowder, Teen Titans and its spin-off Teen Titans Go! and My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic as well as video games such as Mortal Kombat X, Final Fantasy X and X-2 and the Batman: Arkham series. Her portrayals have garnered nominations in the Annie Awards and Daytime Emmys, and an award from the Academy of Interactive Arts & Sciences.

actors.name: Kevin Michael Richardson
actors.short_summary: 美国配音 / 演员。生于纽约，布朗克斯。

actors.name: Phil LaMarr
actors.short_summary: 美国喜剧演员、编剧、配音。生于加尼福利亚州、洛杉矶。以出演《纽约重案组》、《低俗小说》等影视知名。

noun.name: Blaster
noun.summary: 录音机是继方舟19勇士之后和大力金刚等人一同来到地球的成员之一，他和搭档轮胎粉碎了霸天虎的各种阴谋。2005年大战之后，录音机的地位显著提高，他成为了城市指挥官通天晓的副指挥官，更是指挥汽车人抵抗霸天虎军队坚持到变形齿轮送来。在2011年寻找领导模块的任务中，为掩护补天士与声波同归于尽。由于录音机为汽车人的事业做出了不少功绩，汽车人使其复生，成为“双履带”再次担当情报官。最终，他在巨无霸福特打败萨克巨人之后，他和其他汽车人继续前往宇宙和逃离的霸天虎进行战斗。

noun.name: Perceptor
noun.summary: 感知器拥有高度智慧，数据存储能力仅次于擎天柱。熟知各种科学技术，对冶金术，分子化学，电子工程技术更精通。在显微镜模式，具有两种不同的能力。作为光学显微镜可将物体放大10000倍，作为电子扫描显微镜可将物体放大100万倍。利用放大镜聚焦增强光线，感知器能把镜筒转变成光能炮，击穿2000英里外的熔渣制结构，其精确程度可以针尖大小来衡量。应用光能炮他还可变形为第三种模式——静止炮台。在机器人模式，他使用一把振动来复枪。只有他能够破译宇宙飞碟密码。

noun.name: Red Alert
noun.summary: 汽车人成员，可变形为消防队的专用警车，常和消防车搭档行动

actors.name: 愛河里花子
actors.short_summary: 日本の声優、女優，アトミックモンキー所属。神奈川県生まれ。神奈川県立横浜翠嵐高等学校卒業。子役出身。それまでの川添 なおみ、神無月 なおを経て今の芸名となる。本名は岩田 菜穂美（いわた なほみ、旧姓：川添）。夫は同じく声優の岩田光央。

actors.name: Tara Strong
actors.short_summary: Tara Lyn Strong is a Canadian–American actress who has done voice work for numerous animations and video games and performed in various live-action productions. Many of her major voice roles include animated series such as Rugrats, The Powerpuff Girls, The Fairly OddParents, Drawn Together, Ben 10, Chowder, Teen Titans and its spin-off Teen Titans Go! and My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic as well as video games such as Mortal Kombat X, Final Fantasy X and X-2 and the Batman: Arkham series. Her portrayals have garnered nominations in the Annie Awards and Daytime Emmys, and an award from the Academy of Interactive Arts & Sciences.

noun.name: Tracks
noun.summary: 汽车人成员，一级士官下士，可以变形为雪佛兰跑车，跑车形态下可以成为飞行汽车。

noun.name: Skids
noun.summary: 汽车人中的学者，以其发达的大脑和对新信息的不断吸收与分析而著称。他将科学家的理性与艺术家的想象力相结合，无论是在战争之前还是期间，都以独特的探索方式取得重大发现。尽管战争的阴影笼罩，刹车却常梦想忘记战争的恐怖，他的心神经常飘荡于遥远的地方。他喜欢在地球等其他星球游历，体验不同的文化，而不是仅仅分析战争资料。尽管无法完全逃离战争，刹车的思想却自由飞翔，探索事物本质和战争的深层原因。

noun.name: Silverbolt
noun.summary:
银箭是汽车人空中部队——飞行太保的指挥官，由魔力神球赋予生命。坚定的战士，果断的决策，流线型的机体，掩饰在这些表面特征下的银剑竟是个恐高症患者。银剑性格中这令人匪夷所思的一面，对他的一举一动有着重大影响。
因为音近，有人常写作银剑，但这是不对的，他的英文名Silverbolt是银白色弩箭的意思。

noun.name: Air Raid
noun.summary: 在飞行太保中，空袭是最大胆最冲动的一个。为了享受战斗乐趣，他常常不顾自身安危，一头扎入狂派堆中开火扫射，而不是安全的进行远距离攻击。空袭担心过多地思考会让他成为战友的累赘，因此他总是做得多想得少。飞行太保的其他成员希望空袭能更为谨慎一些，不过他们也很欣赏他直率而积极的态度。

noun.name: Rodimus Prime
noun.summary: Hot Rod (aka Rodimus and Hot Rodimus) is brash and headstrong, with an overwhelming self-confidence that borders on arrogance. Kup has assumed the role of mentor and advisor to the impetuous young Hot Rod, offering him wisdom and advice when he needs it (though Hot Rod rarely feels that he does, much to Kup's annoyance). Arcee also serves as a calming influence on Hot Rod, and tends to either worry about him when he is not around, or deride and tease him when he is. Their relationship is antagonistic, but friendly. Exactly how deep Hot Rod's feelings for Arcee might run is unknown.

detail.summary:
Prowl is an Autobot and later Maximal from the Generation 1 continuity family.
(thumbnail)

Prick.
Prowl is the Autobot military strategist. As such, Autobot Commander Optimus Prime keeps Prowl near at hand for his indispensable expertise. Prowl is quiet, competent, loyal, and possessed of almost endless patience.

Prowl's dedication to logic and reason make him an excellent strategist, but not much of a socialite. He really doesn't tend to get along well with his fellow Autobots, many of whom find his strict adherence to military protocol stifling, and his uptight personality sure doesn't help matters. He does not react well to the unexpected, to the point that it can literally scramble his cerebral circuits. The Dinobot commander Grimlock, who is disorder made manifest, especially honks Prowl off, and Grimlock feels pretty much the same way in return, only with more swear words. He's very fond of his acid pellets, though.

In some universes, his need for control can lead him to combine with the Constructicons to form Devastator, or with other Autobots — including Optimus Prime — into Optimus Maximus. In other timelines, at the twilight of the Great War, he joined forces with fellow veterans Ironhide and Silverbolt to form Magnaboss, instrumental to the final Autobot victory.
detail.name: Prowl(g1)

detail.summary:
力量强大，令人敬畏的霸天虎战士，也是极少数和威震天单打独斗还能活着回来的家伙之一，威震天亦对他做出极高评价，忠心耿耿的他是个优秀的变形金刚个体。他非常聪明，逻辑方法十分有效。
震荡波的加农炮手臂与背上的核反应堆相连，可以操纵各种形式的放射波，例如电磁波谱、X射线、红外线以及无线电波，也可以发射强大的能量波。
detail.name: Shockwave

value.v: 防衛参謀 レーザーウェーブ

detail.summary: 闹翻天是一个鬼祟阴险的霸天虎战士，他的注意力总是在各种残忍的消遣活动间不停跳转，难得集中。可要是你以为他头脑简单，那就大错特错了，闹翻天能够运用自身能力残忍的大搞破坏，而其手法更可谓天赋秉异、创意无限。他会突然从天而降，把汽车人或其他路过的倒霉蛋打个措手不及，他选择最佳进攻时机的能力简直无人可比。
detail.name: Skywarp

value.v: 航空兵 スカイワープ

detail.summary:
Sideswipe is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Sideswipe is not nearly as much of a sociopath as his brother Sunstreaker, but he is every bit as skillful. He's more into battle for the sport of it. A bit of a jock, Sideswipe most craves a glorious fight to the finish as a test of his mettle.

With a little reckless edge in his tactics, Sideswipe makes rash decisions that may endanger him, all in the name of possible victory. When everything is on the line, nothing is out of the question for Sideswipe, even cheating. Although his reckless attitude has not changed over time, his cause has: once in it solely for the glory, he's now driven by the desire to defend freedom and the innocent
detail.name: Sideswipe(G1)

detail.summary:
Mirage is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Mirage is what humans call "old money." Before the war, he was a member of affluent Cybertronian society, with his own large estate and high-priced friends. He enjoyed the finer things in life: vintage energon, swank evening events, and turbofox hunts on the grounds. But when the war started, he was forced to choose sides and found himself banded with a group of commoners he didn't really understand. Mirage demands certain high standards from life and has little time for those who can't "rise" to his class.

Some of the other Autobots don't trust Mirage. He feels the war, even after all these millions of years, is beneath him. War is not, after all, how civilized, erudite beings conduct themselves. He often questions the Autobots' violent means, and not-so-secretly hopes they and the Decepticons can get along. Because of this, he has been labelled by a few others as a Decepticon sympathizer. Under Mirage's "holier than thou" attitude pulses the spark of a loyal friend and a consummate field professional... but, most of the time, it's kind of hard to see past his obvious self-involvement. Still, he sided with Optimus Prime for a reason, and he'll be there for the Autobots when they need him.

Mirage has the ability to create illusions which typically either render him invisible or make him appear to be somewhere he isn't. In some universes, he can combine with his fellow Autobots to form Optimus Maximus.
detail.name: Mirage(G1)

detail.summary: 博派恐龙派忠诚勇士，以翼龙形态融合凶猛与飞行之利，虽常因单纯莽撞引人诟病，实则心地善良，善作沟通桥梁。尽管外表骇人，其友善脾性常为误解所掩，但他坚守忠诚，以独特优势震撼战场，让狂派闻风丧胆。
detail.name: Swoop

value.v: 砲撃戦士 スワープ

detail.summary:
Hound is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Hound wishes he were human. The dark, barren metalscapes of Cybertron no longer interest him. Now that Hound has been shipwrecked on Earth, he considers this planet his home. He sees humankind as beautiful and wishes he could interact with their ecosphere the same way they do, to feel what they feel and to see what they see.

He treasures his job as an Autobot scout, making good use of his ability to project holograms for added disguise, and making good use of his skill to track machines and humans alike (like the hound dog of his namesake). He uses this opportunity to explore the breathtaking caverns and mountainous expanses that Earth provides. He's a meek, benevolent soul, even compared to his fellow Autobots. He gets along with the more blood-thirsty of their ranks but not the most blood-thirsty of their ranks.
detail.name: Hound(G1)

detail.summary:
Ratchet is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Ratchet is the Autobots' Chief Medical Officer. If something's broke, he can fix it. Ratchet is known for his irreverent bedside manner; he loves having a good time, and his party-loving nature has given him a dry wit. He is not a particularly mighty warrior, which sometimes leads him to believe that he is expendable. Optimus Prime has trouble convincing Ratchet that this is far from the truth.

Although he's a healer, Ratchet often finds himself on the front lines of combat and, on occasion, the last hope the Autobots have. These pressures are sometimes too much for him to handle, but Ratchet ultimately never gives up.
detail.name: Ratchet(G1)

value.v: 看護員 ラチェット

detail.summary:
Wheeljack is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Wheeljack is his own worst enemy. Something of a crackpot inventor, a good half of his creations blow up in his face, and that's just if he's lucky. His constant need to invent increasingly complex devices stems from his desire to improve the Autobots' tech, but as a result he's simultaneously one of the Autobots' greatest assets and problems; for every successful gadget he builds, there's one which requires Ratchet or Hoist to put him (and his lab) back together. But once in a while he strikes gold, which has won him respect from even the Decepticons.

He is, however, not a complete nerd. As good as he is in the lab, Wheeljack is just as amazing on the road: there are few stunts he can't pull off, and he loves to show off his driving skills as much as he does his inventions. He is, however, a little less confident when it comes to flying, which he accomplishes using solid-fuel rocket jets in his forearms.

As an Action Master Wheeljack utilizes another of his inventions, the dual-mode Turbo Racer, to get around quickly. In some universes he can combine with his fellow Autobots to form Sky Reign.
detail.name: Wheeljack(G1)

value.v: 技術者 ホイルジャック

detail.summary: 分光镜是照相机三人组中头脑最简单的一个。从某种意义上讲，他只是一个工具，只有当别人指明他该干什么、如何干时，他才派得上点儿用场。当与其他两兄弟共事时，分光镜总是悠哉悠哉，因为他不用承担责任了。抢功劳时，分光镜总是冲在最前面，速度几乎和他往别人头上推卸责任时一样快。一旦分光镜察觉同伴反光镜和聚光镜有可能把自己卷入麻烦，他会立即与他们划清界限。
detail.name: Spectro

detail.summary: 惊天雷犹豫彷徨的性格使得他毫无个人目标，加入霸天虎仅仅是因为他鄙视一切不会飞行的东西。威震天的精心宣传及其个人影响力使惊天雷觉得自己的优越感是正确的，而威震天那些关于霸天虎伟业的豪言壮语，也让惊天雷为自己人生找到了方向。
detail.name: Thundercracker

value.v: 航空兵 サンダークラッカー

detail.summary:
霸天虎的情报参谋，侦察专家，掌握组织内所有的情报交流，是威震天不可或缺的副手之一。

声波很少说话，总是在倾听，经常客串各种争吵的调解人。然而他也总是将一些情报私藏在心里，以便有一天有人威胁到他的地位时，可以借此勒索对方。由于他的自私，没人真正喜欢他，但他对此毫不在意。对他而言，信息就是力量。声波总是发出事先录取的声音，个性也完全不明。
detail.name: Soundwave

value.v: 情報参謀 サウンドウェーブ

detail.summary:
Huffer is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

To say that Huffer is cranky is an understatement. Huffer's the poster boy for whiny pessimism. He complains and grumbles his way through every day, especially since he's been shipwrecked on Earth. If he thought his existence was unbearable before, it's intolerable now, and he'll certainly let you know. There is no light in his dark hours... which is all the time.

Despite what a joy he is to be around, he's very effective at his job. A construction engineer, he can whip up anything of any complexity. Unfortunately, he'll be kicking and screaming the whole way.
detail.name: Huffer(G1)

detail.summary:
变形金刚中相当活跃的角色之一。通常是汽车人(Autobot)成员、有时是从霸天虎(Decepticon)转投汽车人，部分作品中有科学家的身份，通常体型比一般的变形金刚来的大，身体以白色为主，背后有红色的枪炮构造、变形成类似飞船或是航天飞机的载具。

在G1动画中，天火是一位善良的老练科学家，身材高大、力量强大，但并不擅长战斗，只喜欢科学实验。在大战前和红蜘蛛(Starscream)是同僚和好朋友，变形成一艘太空船。

在一次探勘任务中，天火意外坠落到地球上，经过多年之后被来到地球的霸天虎给救起，之后不认同霸天虎的理念因而加汽车人。最后为了帮助汽车人，被埋在冰层下，在变形金刚动画第10集后重新被汽车人救起。之后的主要戏份通常是担任汽车人的太空载具。



玩具与版权争议
天火最早的玩具是孩之宝(Hasbro)向万代购买版权的VF-1S的重涂版玩具，来自动画《太空堡垒》系列的原版——1982年的动画《超时空要塞》的VF-1S可变型战斗机。但是因为并没有动画形象使用版权，因此在动画版中的天火形象和玩具经过大幅修改、相差甚异。

于是，在美国的孩之宝卖的天火玩具是属于孩之宝的，但孩之宝的日本合作伙伴特佳丽(Takara)在日本却不能卖、因为同款玩具在日本的贩售权被万代所持有，而为了避免帮敌对公司的玩具打广告，天火在动画中的形象经过重新设计、完全抹除玩具的特征、甚至改名叫作“Skyfire”。其玩具的原始外观之后在部分作品─主要是漫画─中被视为他的“盔甲”，他可以穿戴上以增加火力和防护力。
detail.name: Jetfire

value.v: 航空防衛戦士 スカイファイアー
霸天虎→汽车人（G1，电影2，赛伯坦之战）

detail.summary:
Ironhide is an Autobot and later Maximal from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Ironhide is one of the oldest and toughest Autobots, and has been on Optimus Prime's team for a long time. "They don't make them like they used to" is an apt description of Ironhide—he's yesterday's model, but he's built to last.

Gruff and ornery, he prefers actions to words, and dislikes talk for talk's sake. (He wouldn't enjoy being paired up with Bluestreak.) But though he may be rough around the edges, he's still optimistic and upbeat. The upside to being through more than your share of trouble means trouble ain't so big a scare anymore.

Ironhide's most distinctive ability is the water gun, a weapon which can generate and shoot a liquid of virtually any type. Liquid nitrogen is historically a favorite, but there have been acids, mortar, and more.

His vehicle mode sometimes splits into his robot and a separate component. In some universes, he can combine with his fellow Autobots to form Optimus Maximus. In other timelines, he will survive the Great War, joining forces with other Autobot veterans to form Magnaboss.
detail.name: Ironhide(G1)

value.v: 警備員 アイアンハイド

detail.summary:
Me Grimlock am Dinobot from Generation 1 continuity family.

Some Autobots wonder why Grimlock (aka Clobber) is even on their side. His disposition is much more suited to the Decepticons. After all, he values power and strength over wisdom and compassion, and furthermore, he doesn't really get along with most Autobots. When faced with a problem, his usual responses are to slice it with his energo-sword, tear it to pieces with his bare hands, or outright eat it. He is more willing to accept casualties than most of the Autobot leadership, and doesn't seem particularly concerned about the fleshies either. These things, coupled with his dislike of Optimus Prime, have led to a defection or two on Grimlock's part. He'd have no problem offing the Autobot leader if he thought he could get away with it, though.

What the Autobots don't realize is that the only thing he hates more than weakness is those who abuse their strength, meaning when push comes to shove, Grimlock will always fall in on the right side of the fence. And despite their disagreements, Grimlock holds a respect for Prime's strength and leadership. His real feud within the Autobot ranks is with Prowl; Grimlock's chaotic behavior drives Prowl up the wall, and Prowl's uptight personality gives Grimlock much grief.

Grimlock is the leader of the Dinobots, a small but powerful strike squad. Grimlock himself is extremely strong and durable, and is one of the few Transformers who can not only stand toe-to-toe with Optimus Prime and Megatron, but actually give them a run for their money. Despite his strength and prowess, Grimlock continually struggles with his pronouns.
detail.name: Grimlock(g1)

value.v: 指揮官 グリムロック

detail.summary:
霸天虎战士，声波的磁带部队成员，是个出色的间谍，曾多次进入汽车人的内部获取重要情报。
激光鸟装备有两门精准的激光大炮，具有不俗的作战能力。镭射密探，隶属于声波的磁带军团，是霸天虎重要的侦察兵，多次进入汽车人的内部获得重要的情报。其装备有两门精准的激光大炮，每门炮都可熔化5厘米的钢板。他以狩猎为乐，总是把他的猎物弄得筋疲力尽，然后慢慢加以残杀。其伪装形态为磁带。
detail.name: Laserbeak

value.v: 空中攻撃兵 コンドル

detail.summary: 反光镜是照相机三人组的老大，也是三人中最卑鄙的一个。他和他的组员一样喜爱观察人和事物，但他从中挑刺的能力则无人能及，即使是聚光镜也望尘莫及。反光镜先默默等待着同伴、敌人或其他什么人犯错误，然后便不择手段利用这些错误为自己谋利。他最大的爱好便是敲诈那些玩忽职守或犯了错害怕被上司惩罚的狂派同事。当照相机小组被指派去监视塞伯坦所有秘密摄像机和间谍设备时，反光镜简直乐疯了，因为那将给他提供更多的敲诈资本。
detail.name: Viewfinder

detail.summary: 录音机是继方舟19勇士之后和大力金刚等人一同来到地球的成员之一，他和搭档轮胎粉碎了霸天虎的各种阴谋。2005年大战之后，录音机的地位显著提高，他成为了城市指挥官通天晓的副指挥官，更是指挥汽车人抵抗霸天虎军队坚持到变形齿轮送来。在2011年寻找领导模块的任务中，为掩护补天士与声波同归于尽。由于录音机为汽车人的事业做出了不少功绩，汽车人使其复生，成为“双履带”再次担当情报官。最终，他在巨无霸福特打败萨克巨人之后，他和其他汽车人继续前往宇宙和逃离的霸天虎进行战斗。
detail.name: Blaster

value.v: 通信員 ブロードキャスト

detail.summary:
红蜘蛛是奸诈的霸天虎空中指挥官，也是追踪者中最致命的。他自称是塞伯坦战争学院的骄傲，不仅以其令人难以置信的技能而闻名，还以其无限（且麻烦）的野心而闻名。红蜘蛛认为他比霸天虎领袖威震天更适合指挥，从简单地希望这个头衔来打击他的自尊心到真正关心威震天的运作方式。
值得庆幸的是，红蜘蛛叛变、夺权阴谋几乎总是透明的，他永远无法鼓起足够的耐心来完成一场宏大的权力游戏。即使在他几次指挥霸天虎的时候，他也很快就失去了对局势的控制，他太傲慢了，从不从错误中吸取教训，但话又说回来，威震天也没有，因为他从未将红蜘蛛变成渣滓。尽管他不断失败，但红蜘蛛相信他获胜只是时间问题——他的命运是不可避免的。
红蜘蛛原本是塞伯坦星球的一名研究地质专业的科学家，枯燥的研究生活使他加入了霸天虎。尽管已作为威震天的副官位极人臣，但巨大的野心使他不安于现状，一心想着有一天取代威震天成为霸天虎的首领，然而屡次发动叛乱都因实力不足和无人响应而失败。
detail.name: Starscream

value.v: 航空参謀 スタースクリーム

detail.summary:
御天敌是一位很威武的人物，凌驾于大多数汽车人之上。包裹全身的重武器以及适用于汽车人军队的装甲使得御天敌充满了对自己作为一名领袖和战士的能力的自信。不幸的是这样的骄傲通常会使人堕落，而总会有个人 会证明这一点，或是某个仅仅把御天敌看做是实现大业道路上的绊脚石。

御天敌是和擎天柱最近的汽车人前任领袖。（他不是领袖的时候除外）
detail.name: Sentinel Prime

detail.summary:
Sunstreaker is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Sunstreaker knows to the core of his spark that he is better than any other Autobot, and he makes sure everyone else knows it, too. His sociopathic tendencies, combined with his incredible vanity and arrogance, usually result in tension between himself and the other Autobots. He is generally unwilling to help those who are having trouble keeping up, and is quite audible when it comes to complaining about the shortcomings of everyone else. The only Autobot he truly gets along with is his twin brother, Sideswipe, and even that can seem strained at times.

The main reason Optimus Prime keeps him around is most likely Sunstreaker's effectiveness on the battlefield. Ruthless and skilled in all forms of combat, there is not much Sunstreaker cannot handle. As a front-line warrior, Sunstreaker is a great asset for the Autobot army. If a rather scary one.

In some universes, he can combine with his fellow Autobots to form Optimus Maximus.
detail.name: Sunstreaker(G1)

value.v: VSZ 戦士 サンストリーカー

detail.summary:
汽车人成员，一名机器人卫兵，总是把责任看得很重。他力量大、火力强劲，防御出色。其死敌是霸天虎的合体金刚“大力神”。

大力金刚是一名机器卫兵，总是把责任看得很重。他力大，火力强劲，防御能力优秀——这些特点都使他成为汽车人同伴所信赖的一名出色战士。大力金刚的说话方式有异于其他汽车人。由于力大无穷，胃口太大成为了他为数不多的弱点之一。他偶尔也会在长途飞行中因能量不足而导致内部损伤，无法继续运作，因而也能间接看出了老一代汽车人在动力装置上的缺陷。
detail.name: Omega Supreme

value.v: 警備員 オメガ・スプリーム

detail.summary: 嚎叫通常是在沉默之中度过郁闷的时光。这个不合群的家伙喜欢让别人去处理战略方面的事，自己只要听从钢锁派遣直接去打仗就好了。这让他成为机器恐龙指挥官在战场上最得力的战士。嚎叫远离了他的故乡——那片令他钟爱的金属平原，新的变形形态又让他觉得极其恶心，支持他活下去的唯一乐趣只剩下和狂派死磕到底。在他心中，世上比自己的变形形态更为不爽的就只有那些狂派的家伙了。
detail.name: Snarl

value.v: 砂漠戦士 スナール

detail.summary: 无论是执行间谍任务还是监视任务，聚光镜都算得上是个十足的工作狂。他希望能够观察所有人的言行，以便掌握他们的弱点。每当反光镜想出什么计划时，聚光镜总是第一个表示赞成：他从不放过任何能让自己领先于他人的机会。聚光镜总得花不少时间说服多疑的分光镜同意他们的计划。同时，他还必须尽可能的对分光镜隐藏计划细节。因为他明白只要有利可图，分光镜会立刻出卖他们。
detail.name: Spyglass

detail.summary: 感知器拥有高度智慧，数据存储能力仅次于擎天柱。熟知各种科学技术，对冶金术，分子化学，电子工程技术更精通。在显微镜模式，具有两种不同的能力。作为光学显微镜可将物体放大10000倍，作为电子扫描显微镜可将物体放大100万倍。利用放大镜聚焦增强光线，感知器能把镜筒转变成光能炮，击穿2000英里外的熔渣制结构，其精确程度可以针尖大小来衡量。应用光能炮他还可变形为第三种模式——静止炮台。在机器人模式，他使用一把振动来复枪。只有他能够破译宇宙飞碟密码。
detail.name: Perceptor

value.v: 科学者 パーセプター

detail.summary: 铲土机为霸天虎设计建设的精美完善的都市和发电厂，充分的体现了他在建筑方面的天赋，同他毫不起眼的外形一样，他所设计的建筑完全能很好的隐迹于人为的建筑当中，面对同伴给予的赞许，他很谦虚地说：“是大家赋予我源源不断的灵感。”毕竟他只是在履行自己的职责。但他藏匿于建筑工地中，对他的敌人进行突袭，这和谦虚相对，可是另外一码事儿。采用这种手段，铲土机努力从威震天那里赢取更多的荣耀和赞赏，多少也显露了他的阴损恶毒的个性。正因如此，威震天认为他是挖地虎中最有价值的战士。（IDW漫画中铲土机被当时观天会高层斯派克·维特维奇射杀。）
detail.name: Scrapper

value.v: 建築兵 スクラッパー

detail.summary:
Cliffjumper is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Nobody hates Decepticons more than Cliffjumper. He's always ready to charge into battle, a gung-ho little hero who'll take on any threat with a cry of "Lemme at 'em!" He's daring, dedicated, and determined, and takes the business of fighting evil seriously, but he's not a patient 'bot; he'll often act without thinking, shooting first and asking questions later, or picking fights that he really can't hope to win. He's even been known to blow out his own tires by speeding into action too quickly!

Cliffjumper doesn't dislike Earth, but any concern he has for it comes in a distant second to taking down a 'Con, and that means he'll often cause damage to the surrounding area in battle without really thinking about it, which in turn leads to lectures from Optimus Prime. But that's far from the worst disagreement he's been known to have with his fellow Autobots: his hatred for the Decepticons is so great that, if he gets the sense one of his team-mates isn't fully committed to the Autobot cause, he'll be quick to point an accusing finger and even cry "traitor!", as Mirage has found out more than once.

Cliffjumper's special weapon is his glass gas, which embrittles metals on contact so that they shatter like glass.
detail.name: Cliffjumper(G1)

detail.summary: 汽车人最亲密的地球盟友，原职业为石油工人。他不仅在战斗中成长，还在关键时刻助力汽车人对抗霸天虎，最终成家立业，成为星云星上的重要人物。
detail.name: Spike Witwicky

detail.summary: 汽车人成员，可变形为消防队的专用警车，常和消防车搭档行动
detail.name: Red Alert

detail.summary:
银箭是汽车人空中部队——飞行太保的指挥官，由魔力神球赋予生命。坚定的战士，果断的决策，流线型的机体，掩饰在这些表面特征下的银剑竟是个恐高症患者。银剑性格中这令人匪夷所思的一面，对他的一举一动有着重大影响。
因为音近，有人常写作银剑，但这是不对的，他的英文名Silverbolt是银白色弩箭的意思。
detail.name: Silverbolt

value.v: 指揮官 シルバーボルト

detail.summary: 汽车人中的学者，以其发达的大脑和对新信息的不断吸收与分析而著称。他将科学家的理性与艺术家的想象力相结合，无论是在战争之前还是期间，都以独特的探索方式取得重大发现。尽管战争的阴影笼罩，刹车却常梦想忘记战争的恐怖，他的心神经常飘荡于遥远的地方。他喜欢在地球等其他星球游历，体验不同的文化，而不是仅仅分析战争资料。尽管无法完全逃离战争，刹车的思想却自由飞翔，探索事物本质和战争的深层原因。
detail.name: Skids

detail.summary: 汽车人成员，一级士官下士，可以变形为雪佛兰跑车，跑车形态下可以成为飞行汽车。
detail.name: Tracks

detail.summary: 在搅拌机灼热的搅拌滚筒里，没有任何东西是安全的。在制作新原料地时候，他会利用任何必然的原料，无论是无生命的岩石还是有生命的机器人。他经常会将豪华轿车放入搅拌筒里。然后将他们做成钢梁，当他搅拌原材料的时候，与其说他是个挖地虎战士，还不如说他就是一个咯咯怪叫的中世纪老巫婆—制作新的原料的程序就像是一个神秘的仪式。有时候其他霸天虎成员在观看他搅拌原料的时候，很想知道是不是搅拌机的逻辑中心出了什么问题，以至于他的行为这么神秘兮兮的……尽管如此，他们还是对搅拌机的劳动成果没有任何疑问。
detail.name: Mixmaster

value.v: 偽装兵 ミックスマスター

detail.summary: Hot Rod (aka Rodimus and Hot Rodimus) is brash and headstrong, with an overwhelming self-confidence that borders on arrogance. Kup has assumed the role of mentor and advisor to the impetuous young Hot Rod, offering him wisdom and advice when he needs it (though Hot Rod rarely feels that he does, much to Kup's annoyance). Arcee also serves as a calming influence on Hot Rod, and tends to either worry about him when he is not around, or deride and tease him when he is. Their relationship is antagonistic, but friendly. Exactly how deep Hot Rod's feelings for Arcee might run is unknown.
detail.name: Rodimus Prime

detail.summary: 在飞行太保中，空袭是最大胆最冲动的一个。为了享受战斗乐趣，他常常不顾自身安危，一头扎入狂派堆中开火扫射，而不是安全的进行远距离攻击。空袭担心过多地思考会让他成为战友的累赘，因此他总是做得多想得少。飞行太保的其他成员希望空袭能更为谨慎一些，不过他们也很欣赏他直率而积极的态度。
detail.name: Air Raid

value.v: 戦士 エアーライダー

detail.summary:
Brawn is an Autobot from the Generation 1 continuity family.

Brawn, the Autobots' demolitions expert, is amazingly strong for his size. Due to his small stature, he often attempts to overcompensate by playing up his macho personality. He loves a challenge, be it rugged off-roading or charging headlong at foes several times his size. He has a lot of chutzpah, and a somewhat sarcastic sense of humor ever at the ready. Due to his machisimo, he sometimes looks down on noncombatant Autobots.

In addition to his great strength, Brawn is also so tough as to be almost indestructible. Almost.

Sometimes he is an ancient Titan Master, and sometimes he is partnered with the Nebulon Muscles as a Headmaster.
detail.name: Brawn(G1)
